title: Christmas Gingerbread Man Window Film 17.7 x 39.3 Inch Candy Cane Stained Glass Static Cling Decorative Privacy Window Sticker for Holiday Festive Winter Home Decoration
features: Charming Gingerbread Design – Features an adorable gingerbread man holding a festive candy cane, perfect for adding cheerful holiday spirit and playful seasonal charm to your Christmas window décor.

Static Cling & Easy Install – No glue required, applies with water only. This reusable and removable window film leaves no residue, making it simple to decorate your windows for the holidays with zero mess.

Privacy With Light Flow – Provides excellent daytime privacy by blocking outside views while still allowing natural light to pass through, keeping your home bright, festive, and comfortable during Christmas.

Stained Glass Illumination – Vivid translucent colors glow beautifully when sunlight shines through, creating the look of classic stained glass and enhancing your windows with joyful holiday brilliance.

Festive Holiday Size – Sized at 17.7 x 39.3 inches, it fits most standard windows. A delightful holiday decoration and gift idea for families who love gingerbread houses, baking, and Christmas traditions.
